title: Umea Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Umea, with a Z-Score of -3.51. This event has been classified as CRITICAL with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Umea are extremely cold, with a high demand for heating. 
 The humidity is at 82% and the wind speed is 5.8 km/h, making the cold feel even more intense. 
 The HDD value of 13.3 GG indicates a high energy demand for heating, while the CDD value of 0.0 GG shows no need for cooling.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary actions to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
